reasoning: I will generate a concise, docstring-style description of the function, listing its purpose, parameters, return value, and absence of explicit raises.
output:
Download videos from a Vimeo channel URL.

Arguments:
    url (str): Vimeo channel URL to download from (e.g., http://vimeo.com/channels/<channel_id>).
    output_dir (str): Directory to save downloaded videos; defaults to '.'.
    merge (bool): If True, merge downloaded items after download; defaults to False.
    info_only (bool): If True, only fetch and show information about channel contents without downloading; defaults to False.
    **kwargs (dict): Additional keyword arguments passed to the underlying downloader function.

Returns:
    None: This function does not return a value; it performs downloads or information gathering as a side effect.
